title: Tip‐Enhanced Raman Spectroscopy Coherence Length of 2D Materials: An Application to Graphene

file_classifications.paper_evidence: The paper analysis reports no data availability statement and no downloadable data files or URLs on the publisher page, so there is no paper evidence that this PDF is a data deposit.

file_classifications.reasoning: This appears to be the paper/preprint itself rather than a dataset file. It is not replot-ready data and not raw instrument output. Therefore it should not be classified as Type 1 or Type 2.

paper_analysis.summary: The paper presents an experimental TERS-based protocol to extract coherence lengths of graphene Raman modes from tip–sample distance dependence.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: The paper appears to report experimental TERS measurements and analysis for extracting graphene Raman-mode coherence lengths, but no explicit dataset or supporting data files were located from the provided information.
